content: Phase 1: Fix token budget tracker (budget shows 0, hourly chart empty)
Phase 2: Fix provider health status banner (shows operational when providers are down)
Phase 3: Fix NIM token logging (NIM calls show 0 tokens)
Phase 4: Fix selfhosted_stt and OpenAI 429 handling
Phase 5: Fix 'Insufficient data' threshold and /me error rate
activeForm: Fixing prediction threshold and auth errors
